---
title: "EVPI_heterogeneous"
author: "Kim (Zhipei) Wang"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
remotes::install_github("zhipeiwang/MetaNB")
library(MetaNB)
library(ggplot2)
library(coda)
library(patchwork)
library(forestploter)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)
```

# EVPI metrics
# EVPI calculations using trivariate meta-analysis
```{r}
fit <- MA_NB_tri(
  data_ADNEXCA125,
  tp = tp, tn = tn, n_event = n_event, n_nonevent = n_nonevent,
  center_rows = 1:37,
  center_label_cols = c("Publication", "Country"),
  prior_type = "weak",
  return_vars = c("NB", "probuseful", "pooledprev"),
  t = 0.1,
  seed = 123,
  compute_EVPI = TRUE,
  sample_by = 1000,
  auto_resample = FALSE
)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
fit$voi_diagnostics
```

```{r}
fit$voi_center_metrics
```

```{r}
fit$voi_metrics
```

### Meta-analysis results for the IOTA-ADNEX model
```{r}
summary <- summarize_tri_ma(
  fit$samples,
  data = data_ADNEXCA125,
  label_cols = c("Publication", "Country", "N", "Prev"),
  metrics = c("NB", "probuseful"),
  per_study_metrics = c("NB", "RU"),
  return_known = FALSE,
  include_per_study = FALSE)
summary
```


```{r}
plot_forest(
  fit$samples,
  data = data_ADNEXCA125,
  label_cols = c("Publication", "Country", "N", "Prev"),
  metric = "NB",
#  center = "Median",
  t = 0.1,
  mark_imputed = FALSE,
  xlim = c(-0.1, 0.7),
  file_png = "forest_nb_paper.png",
  file_pdf = "forest_nb_paper.pdf"
)
```

```{r}
fit$voi_metrics$diff_modelvsTA
```

## Single-setting EVPI calculations
```{r}
# Adapted from .dca_binary in the bayesDCA package (https://github.com/giulianonetto/bayesdca)
bayesdca_nb <- function(
    TP, FP, TN, FN,
    threshold,
    prior_p1 = 1, prior_p2 = 1,
    prior_Se1 = 1, prior_Se2 = 1,
    prior_Sp1 = 1, prior_Sp2 = 1,
    n_draws = 4000,
    summary_probs = c(0.025, 0.975)
) {

  # basic quantities
  N <- TP + FP + TN + FN
  d <- TP + FN
  thresholds <- threshold
  w_t <- thresholds / (1 - thresholds)

  # posterior parameters
  post_shape1_p <- d + prior_p1
  post_shape2_p <- N - d + prior_p2

  post_shape1_Se <- TP + prior_Se1
  post_shape2_Se <- d - TP + prior_Se2   # = FN + prior_Se2

  post_shape1_Sp <- TN + prior_Sp1
  post_shape2_Sp <- N - d - TN + prior_Sp2   # = FP + prior_Sp2

  # posterior draws
  p <- rbeta(n_draws, shape1 = post_shape1_p, shape2 = post_shape2_p)
  se <- rbeta(n_draws, shape1 = post_shape1_Se, shape2 = post_shape2_Se)
  sp <- rbeta(n_draws, shape1 = post_shape1_Sp, shape2 = post_shape2_Sp)

  # net benefit draws
  model <- se * p - w_t * (1 - sp) * (1 - p)
  treat_all <- p - (1 - p) * w_t
  treat_none <- rep(0, n_draws)

  # summaries
  summarize_draws <- function(x, probs = summary_probs) {
    c(
      mean = mean(x),
      median = median(x),
      lower = unname(quantile(x, probs[1])),
      upper = unname(quantile(x, probs[2]))
    )
  }

  means <- c(
    treat_none = mean(treat_none),
    model = mean(model),
    treat_all = mean(treat_all)
  )

  winner_strategy <- names(means)[which.max(means)]

  # EVPI
  enb_current <- max(means)

  enb_perfect <- mean(
    pmax(treat_none, treat_all, model)
  )

  EVPI <- enb_perfect - enb_current

  list(
    inputs = list(
      TP = TP, FP = FP, TN = TN, FN = FN,
      N = N, d = d, threshold = threshold
    ),
    parameters = list(
      prevalence = c(shape1 = post_shape1_p, shape2 = post_shape2_p),
      sensitivity = c(shape1 = post_shape1_Se, shape2 = post_shape2_Se),
      specificity = c(shape1 = post_shape1_Sp, shape2 = post_shape2_Sp)
    ),
    draws = list(
      p = p,
      se = se,
      sp = sp,
      model = model,
      treat_all = treat_all,
      treat_none = treat_none
    ),
    summary = list(
      prevalence = summarize_draws(p),
      sensitivity = summarize_draws(se),
      specificity = summarize_draws(sp),
      model = summarize_draws(model),
      treat_all = summarize_draws(treat_all),
      treat_none = summarize_draws(treat_none),
      winner_strategy = winner_strategy,
      EVPI = EVPI,
      enb_current = enb_current,
      enb_perfect = enb_perfect
    )
  )
}
```


```{r}
# single-setting results
set.seed(123)

evpi_results <- vector("list", nrow(data_ADNEXCA125))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(data_ADNEXCA125))) {

  fit <- bayesdca_nb(
    TP = data_ADNEXCA125$tp[i],
    FP = data_ADNEXCA125$n_nonevent[i] - data_ADNEXCA125$tn[i],
    TN = data_ADNEXCA125$tn[i],
    FN = data_ADNEXCA125$n_event[i] - data_ADNEXCA125$tp[i],
    threshold = 0.1
  )

  evpi_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
    center_row = i,
    Publication = data_ADNEXCA125$Publication[i],
    Country = data_ADNEXCA125$Country[i],
    N = data_ADNEXCA125$N[i],
    Prev = data_ADNEXCA125$Prev[i],
    method = "single_setting",
    NB_model_mean      = mean(fit$draws$model),
    NB_TA_mean         = mean(fit$draws$treat_all),
    delta_NB = mean(fit$draws$model) - max(mean(fit$draws$treat_all), 0),
    NB_center_currentinfo = fit$summary$enb_current,
    NB_center_perfectinfo = fit$summary$enb_perfect,
    center_winner_strategy = fit$summary$winner_strategy,
    EVPI_center_perfectinfo = fit$summary$EVPI
  )
}

evpi_single_df <- do.call(rbind, evpi_results)
evpi_single_df
```


## triMA results rearranged for comparison
```{r}
# triMA results
evpi_triMA_df <- fit$center_metrics %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    data_ADNEXCA125 %>%
      dplyr::mutate(center_row = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
      dplyr::select(center_row, Publication, Country, N, Prev),
    by = "center_row"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(method = "triMA",
                delta_NB = NB_model_mean - max(NB_TA_mean, 0)
                ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    center_row, Publication, Country, N, Prev, method,
    NB_model_mean,
    NB_TA_mean,
    delta_NB,
    NB_center_currentinfo,
    NB_center_perfectinfo,
    center_winner_strategy,
    EVPI_center_perfectinfo
  ) %>%
  data.frame()
```

## results from single-setting and triMA combined
```{r}
# combine
evpi_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(evpi_single_df, evpi_triMA_df)

evpi_wide <- evpi_long %>%
  dplyr::select(
    center_row, Publication, Country, N, Prev, method,
    NB_model_mean,
    NB_TA_mean,
    delta_NB,
    EVPI_center_perfectinfo,
    center_winner_strategy,
    NB_center_currentinfo,
    NB_center_perfectinfo
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = method,
    values_from = c(
      NB_model_mean,
      NB_TA_mean,
      delta_NB,
      EVPI_center_perfectinfo,
      center_winner_strategy,
      NB_center_currentinfo,
      NB_center_perfectinfo
    ),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{method}"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    EVPI_diff = EVPI_center_perfectinfo_triMA - EVPI_center_perfectinfo_single_setting,
    EVPI_diff_perc = 100 * EVPI_diff / EVPI_center_perfectinfo_single_setting,
    winner_same = center_winner_strategy_triMA == center_winner_strategy_single_setting
  )

evpi_wide$Prev <- as.numeric(sub("%", "", evpi_wide$Prev))
evpi_wide$Prev <- evpi_wide$Prev / 100
```

```{r}
evpi_wide %>%
  arrange(desc(Prev))
# Prevalence is high in centers where the winner strategy is treat all
```


```{r}
evpi_wide %>%
  arrange(N)
```

```{r}
evpi_wide %>%
  arrange(desc(Prev)) %>%
  filter(EVPI_diff > 0)
```

```{r}
evpi_wide %>%
  filter(winner_same == FALSE)
```

```{r}
p_evpi <- ggplot(evpi_wide, aes(
  x = EVPI_center_perfectinfo_single_setting,
  y = EVPI_center_perfectinfo_triMA,
  color = winner_same,
  size = N
)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    # title = "Comparison of center-level EVPI estimates",
    x = "EVPI single-setting",
    y = "EVPI trivariate meta-analysis",
    size = "Sample size"
  ) +
  # scale_color_manual(values = c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00"), name = "Winner strategy", labels = c("Treat all", "Model")) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00"),
    name = "Winner strategy same?",
    labels = c("No", "Yes")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_evpi
```


```{r}
ggplot(evpi_wide, aes(
  x = EVPI_center_perfectinfo_single_setting,
  y = EVPI_center_perfectinfo_triMA,
  color = winner_same,
  size = Prev
)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    # title = "Comparison of center-level EVPI estimates",
    x = "EVPI single-setting",
    y = "EVPI trivariate meta-analysis",
    size = "Prevalence"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00"),
    name = "Winner strategy same?",
    labels = c("No", "Yes")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
p_nb <- ggplot(evpi_wide, aes(
  x = NB_model_mean_single_setting,
  y = NB_model_mean_triMA,
  color = winner_same,
  size = N
)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    # title = "Comparison of center-level NB estimates",
    x = "NB ADNEX single-setting",
    y = "NB ADNEX trivariate meta-analysis",
    size = "Sample size"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00"),
    name = "Winner strategy same?",
    labels = c("No", "Yes")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
p_nb
```


```{r}
p_delta <- ggplot(evpi_wide, aes(
  x = delta_NB_single_setting,
  y = delta_NB_triMA,
  color = winner_same,
  size = N
)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    # title = "Comparison of center-level delta NB estimates",
    x = "Delta NB single-setting",
    y = "Delta NB trivariate meta-analysis",
    size = "Sample size"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00"),
    name = "Winner strategy same?",
    labels = c("No", "Yes")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
p_delta
```
```{r}
combined_plot <- (p_nb | p_delta | p_evpi) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
combined_plot

ggsave(
  filename = "comparison_plots.png",
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 20,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "comparison_plots.pdf",
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 20,
  height = 8
)
```

# only 5 validations
```{r}
data_small <- data_ADNEXCA125[c(30, 33, 34, 35, 36), ]

fit_small <- MA_NB_tri_voi(
  data_small,
  tp = tp, tn = tn, n_event = n_event, n_nonevent = n_nonevent,
  center_label_cols = c("Publication", "Country"),
  prior_type = "weak",
  t = 0.1,
  seed = 123,
  sample_by = 1000,
  auto_resample = FALSE,
  return_draws = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
fit_small$metrics
```


# Optimal strategy conditional on prevalence
```{r}
prev_grid <- sort(unique(c(seq(0.05, 0.9, by = 0.1), 0.9, 0.60, seq(0.55, 0.6, by = 0.01), seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01))))

results_list <- vector("list", length(prev_grid))

for (i in seq_along(prev_grid)) {
  
  p0 <- prev_grid[i]
  
  fit <- MA_NB_tri(
    data = data_ADNEXCA125,
    tp = tp,
    tn = tn,
    n_event = n_event,
    n_nonevent = n_nonevent,
    prior_type = "weak",
    t = 0.1,
    seed = 123,
    prev_known = p0,
    return_known = TRUE
  )
  
  sum_res <- summarize_tri_ma(
    samples = fit,
    data = data_ADNEXCA125,
    return_known = TRUE,
    metrics = c("NB", "probuseful", "NBnew_known", "NBnew_TA_known")
  )
  
  nb_model <- sum_res$NB$pooled_known$model
  nb_ta    <- sum_res$NB$pooled_known$treat_all
  
  nb_model_new <- sum_res$NBnew_known$scalar
  nb_ta_new    <- sum_res$NBnew_TA_known$scalar
  pi_model <- sum_res$NB$pred_known$model
  pi_ta    <- sum_res$NB$pred_known$treat_all
  
  probuseful_known <- sum_res$probuseful$value_known
  
  means <- c(
    treat_none = 0,
    model = nb_model["Mean"],
    treat_all = nb_ta["Mean"]
  )
  
  means_new <- c(
    treat_none = 0,
    model = nb_model_new["Mean"],
    treat_all = nb_ta_new["Mean"]
  )
  
  winner <- names(means)[which.max(means)]
  winner_new <- names(means_new)[which.max(means_new)]
  
  results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    prev_known = p0,
    
    NB_TN_mean = 0,
    NB_TN_median = 0,
    
    NB_model_mean = unname(nb_model["Mean"]),
    NB_model_median = unname(nb_model["Median"]),
    NB_model_cri_low = unname(nb_model["Low"]),
    NB_model_cri_high = unname(nb_model["High"]),
    NB_model_pi_low = unname(pi_model["Low"]),
    NB_model_pi_high = unname(pi_model["High"]),
    
    NB_TA_mean = unname(nb_ta["Mean"]),
    NB_TA_median = unname(nb_ta["Median"]),
    NB_TA_cri_low = unname(nb_ta["Low"]),
    NB_TA_cri_high = unname(nb_ta["High"]),
    NB_model_new_mean = unname(nb_model_new["Mean"]),
    NB_TA_new_mean = unname(nb_ta_new["Mean"]),
    NB_TA_pi_low = unname(pi_ta["Low"]),
    NB_TA_pi_high = unname(pi_ta["High"]),
    
    probuseful_known = probuseful_known,
    winner_strategy = winner,
    winner_strategy_new = winner_new
  )
}

prev_strategy_df <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
prev_strategy_df
```

```{r}
prev_strategy_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    winner_prev = dplyr::lag(winner_strategy),
    switched = winner_strategy != winner_prev
  ) %>%
  filter(switched == TRUE)
```

```{r}
prev_strategy_df <- prev_strategy_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    winner_strategy = sub("\\..*$", "", winner_strategy),
    winner_strategy_new = sub("\\..*$", "", winner_strategy_new)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(probuseful = probuseful_known)

prev_strategy_df_out <- prev_strategy_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4))
  ) %>%
  select(prev_known, NB_TN_mean, NB_model_mean, NB_TA_mean, NB_model_new_mean, NB_TA_new_mean, probuseful, winner_strategy, winner_strategy_new)

library(flextable)
library(officer)

ft <- flextable(prev_strategy_df_out)
ft <- autofit(ft)

save_as_docx(
  "Optimal strategy conditional prevalence" = ft,
  path = "prev_strategy_table_updated.docx"
)
```

```{r}
MA_NB_tri_res_prev002 <- MA_NB_tri(
  data = data_ADNEXCA125,
  tp = tp, tn = tn, n_event = n_event, n_nonevent = n_nonevent,
  prior_type = "weak",
  t = 0.1,
  seed = 123,
  prev_known = 0.02,
  return_known = TRUE
)

MA_NB_tri_res_prev09 <- MA_NB_tri(
  data = data_ADNEXCA125,
  tp = tp, tn = tn, n_event = n_event, n_nonevent = n_nonevent,
  prior_type = "weak",
  t = 0.1,
  seed = 123,
  prev_known = 0.9,
  return_known = TRUE
)
```
```{r}
mcmc_hist(MA_NB_tri_res_prev002$samples, pars = c("NBnew", "pooledNB"))

```

```{r}
mcmc_hist(MA_NB_tri_res_prev002$samples, pars = c("NBnew_known", "pooledNB_known"))
```
```{r}
mcmc_hist(MA_NB_tri_res_prev09$samples, pars = c("NBnew_known", "pooledNB_known"))
```
## extra forest plots
```{r}
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 10
# sNB

# Compute per-study sNB
# Prevalence from data
prev_num <- as.numeric(sub("%", "", data_ADNEXCA125$Prev)) / 100

# Per-study observed NB
nb_obs <- MetaNB:::compute_nb_ci_delta(
  tp         = data_ADNEXCA125$tp,
  tn         = data_ADNEXCA125$tn,
  n_event    = data_ADNEXCA125$n_event,
  n_nonevent = data_ADNEXCA125$n_nonevent,
  t          = 0.1
)

snb_est  <- nb_obs$est  / prev_num
snb_low  <- nb_obs$low  / prev_num
snb_high <- nb_obs$high / prev_num

# Pooled sNB from posterior draws
# draw-level sNB = pooledNB / pooledprev, then summarise
draws <- MetaNB:::mcmc_list_to_draws(fit$samples)

snb_draws    <- draws$pooledNB / draws$pooledprev
snb_pool_est <- mean(snb_draws)
snb_pool_low <- quantile(snb_draws, 0.025)
snb_pool_high<- quantile(snb_draws, 0.975)

# Predictive sNB: NBnew / prevnew
snb_pred_draws <- draws$NBnew / draws$prevnew
snb_pred_low   <- quantile(snb_pred_draws, 0.025)
snb_pred_high  <- quantile(snb_pred_draws, 0.975)

# Sort studies by sNB
ord <- order(snb_est)
data_sorted  <- data_ADNEXCA125[ord, ]
prev_sorted  <- prev_num[ord]
snb_est_s    <- snb_est[ord]
snb_low_s    <- snb_low[ord]
snb_high_s   <- snb_high[ord]

# Build display table
n_studies <- nrow(data_ADNEXCA125)
plot_col_width <- 50

df_studies <- data.frame(
  Publication = as.character(data_sorted$Publication),
  Country     = as.character(data_sorted$Country),
  N           = format(data_sorted$N, big.mark = ",", trim = TRUE),
  Prev        = data_sorted$Prev,
  ` `         = strrep(" ", plot_col_width),
  sNB         = sprintf("%.2f", snb_est_s),
  `95% CI`    = sprintf("[%.2f; %.2f]", snb_low_s, snb_high_s),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Pooled row
pooled_row <- data.frame(
  Publication = "Pooled estimate",
  Country     = "", N = "", Prev = "",
  ` `         = strrep(" ", plot_col_width),
  sNB         = sprintf("%.2f", snb_pool_est),
  `95% CI`    = sprintf("[%.2f; %.2f]", snb_pool_low, snb_pool_high),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Prediction interval row
pred_row <- data.frame(
  Publication = "Prediction interval",
  Country     = "", N = "", Prev = "",
  ` `         = strrep(" ", plot_col_width),
  sNB         = "",
  `95% CI`    = sprintf("[%.2f; %.2f]", snb_pred_low, snb_pred_high),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(df_studies, pooled_row, pred_row) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))

# Numeric vectors for CI panel
est   <- c(snb_est_s,    snb_pool_est, NA)
lower <- c(snb_low_s,    snb_pool_low, NA)
upper <- c(snb_high_s,   snb_pool_high, NA)
is_sum <- c(rep(FALSE, n_studies), TRUE, FALSE)

ci_col <- which(names(tbl) == " ")

# x-limits
all_lims <- c(lower, upper, snb_pred_low, snb_pred_high)
xlim <- range(all_lims, na.rm = TRUE)
pad  <- 0.05 * diff(xlim)
xlim <- xlim + c(-pad, pad)
xlim[1] <- min(xlim[1], 0)

# Draw
tm <- forestploter::forest_theme(
  base_size    = 10,
  summary_fill = "grey20",
  summary_col  = "grey20",
  point_size   = 2
)

p <- forestploter::forest(
  tbl,
  est        = est,
  lower      = lower,
  upper      = upper,
  is_summary = is_sum,
  ci_column  = ci_col,
  xlab       = "Standardized Net Benefit",
  xlim       = xlim,
  ref_line   = snb_pool_est,
  theme      = tm
)

# Add prediction interval bar
npc_x <- function(x) (x - xlim[1]) / diff(xlim)

p <- forestploter::add_grob(
  p,
  row   = n_studies + 2,
  col   = ci_col,
  gb_fn = grid::segmentsGrob,
  x0    = grid::unit(npc_x(snb_pred_low),  "npc"),
  x1    = grid::unit(npc_x(snb_pred_high), "npc"),
  y0    = grid::unit(0.5, "npc"),
  y1    = grid::unit(0.5, "npc"),
  gp    = grid::gpar(lwd = 3)
)

png("forest_plot_sNB.png", 
    width = get_wh(p, unit = "in")[1], height = get_wh(p, unit = "in")[2], 
    units = "in", res = 300, bg = "white")
plot(p)
dev.off()
```


```{r}
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 10
# delta NB

# observed NB_TA per study
nb_ta_obs <- prev_num - (1 - prev_num) * 0.1 / (1 - 0.1)

# dNB = NB - max(0, NB_TA) per study
dnb_est  <- nb_obs$est - pmax(0, nb_ta_obs)

# delta method CI for dNB:
# NB_TA at observed prev is a fixed scalar per study
dnb_low  <- nb_obs$low  - pmax(0, nb_ta_obs)
dnb_high <- nb_obs$high - pmax(0, nb_ta_obs)

# Pooled dNB from posterior draws
# draw-level: pooledNB - max(0, pooledNB_TA)
dnb_pool_draws <- draws$pooledNB - pmax(0, draws$pooledNB_TA)
dnb_pool_est   <- mean(dnb_pool_draws)
dnb_pool_low   <- quantile(dnb_pool_draws, 0.025)
dnb_pool_high  <- quantile(dnb_pool_draws, 0.975)

# Predictive dNB: NBnew - max(0, NBnew_TA)
dnb_pred_draws <- draws$NBnew - pmax(0, draws$NBnew_TA)
dnb_pred_low   <- quantile(dnb_pred_draws, 0.025)
dnb_pred_high  <- quantile(dnb_pred_draws, 0.975)

# Sort studies by dNB
ord <- order(dnb_est)
data_sorted <- data_ADNEXCA125[ord, ]
dnb_est_s   <- dnb_est[ord]
dnb_low_s   <- dnb_low[ord]
dnb_high_s  <- dnb_high[ord]

# Build display table
n_studies      <- nrow(data_ADNEXCA125)
plot_col_width <- 50

df_studies <- data.frame(
  Publication = as.character(data_sorted$Publication),
  Country     = as.character(data_sorted$Country),
  N           = format(data_sorted$N, big.mark = ",", trim = TRUE),
  Prev        = data_sorted$Prev,
  ` `         = strrep(" ", plot_col_width),
  dNB         = sprintf("%.2f", dnb_est_s),
  `95% CI`    = sprintf("[%.2f; %.2f]", dnb_low_s, dnb_high_s),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

pooled_row <- data.frame(
  Publication = "Pooled estimate",
  Country = "", N = "", Prev = "",
  ` `         = strrep(" ", plot_col_width),
  dNB         = sprintf("%.2f", dnb_pool_est),
  `95% CI`    = sprintf("[%.2f; %.2f]", dnb_pool_low, dnb_pool_high),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

pred_row <- data.frame(
  Publication = "Prediction interval",
  Country = "", N = "", Prev = "",
  ` `         = strrep(" ", plot_col_width),
  dNB         = "",
  `95% CI`    = sprintf("[%.2f; %.2f]", dnb_pred_low, dnb_pred_high),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(df_studies, pooled_row, pred_row) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), as.character))

# Numeric vectors for CI panel
est    <- c(dnb_est_s,   dnb_pool_est, NA)
lower  <- c(dnb_low_s,   dnb_pool_low, NA)
upper  <- c(dnb_high_s,  dnb_pool_high, NA)
is_sum <- c(rep(FALSE, n_studies), TRUE, FALSE)

ci_col <- which(names(tbl) == " ")

all_lims <- c(lower, upper, dnb_pred_low, dnb_pred_high)
xlim <- range(all_lims, na.rm = TRUE)
pad  <- 0.05 * diff(xlim)
xlim <- xlim + c(-pad, pad)
xlim[1] <- min(xlim[1], 0)

#  Draw
tm <- forestploter::forest_theme(
  base_size    = 10,
  summary_fill = "grey20",
  summary_col  = "grey20",
  point_size   = 2
)

p <- forestploter::forest(
  tbl,
  est        = est,
  lower      = lower,
  upper      = upper,
  is_summary = is_sum,
  ci_column  = ci_col,
  xlab       = "Delta Net Benefit",
  xlim       = xlim,
  ref_line   = 0,
  theme      = tm
)

# Add prediction interval bar
npc_x <- function(x) (x - xlim[1]) / diff(xlim)

p <- forestploter::add_grob(
  p,
  row   = n_studies + 2,
  col   = ci_col,
  gb_fn = grid::segmentsGrob,
  x0    = grid::unit(npc_x(dnb_pred_low),  "npc"),
  x1    = grid::unit(npc_x(dnb_pred_high), "npc"),
  y0    = grid::unit(0.5, "npc"),
  y1    = grid::unit(0.5, "npc"),
  gp    = grid::gpar(lwd = 3)
)

png("forest_plot_dNB.png", 
    width = get_wh(p, unit = "in")[1], height = get_wh(p, unit = "in")[2], 
    units = "in", res = 300, bg = "white")
plot(p)
dev.off()
```
